requirements.description: Publish OAuth Protected Resource Metadata so agents can discover how to authenticate
requirements.shortPrompt: Publish /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource with your resource identifier and authorization_servers so agents can discover how to authenticate.
requirements.prompt: Publish /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource with your resource identifier, authorization_servers, and scopes_supported.

requirements.description: Publish an A2A Agent Card for agent-to-agent discovery
requirements.shortPrompt: Serve an A2A Agent Card at /.well-known/agent-card.json with your agent name, version, supported interfaces, capabilities, and skills.
requirements.prompt: Serve an A2A Agent Card (JSON) at /.well-known/agent-card.json describing your agent. Include name, version, description, supportedInterfaces, capabilities, and skills.
